title: nephroia orbiculata
intro: Nephroia orbiculata, also known as the kidney bean tree or Nepalese kidney bean, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its ability to support kidney function and potentially alleviate symptoms associated with kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Nephroia orbiculata are attributed to its high concentration of antioxidants, which may help protect the kidneys from damage and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Nephroia orbiculata can be made into teas, capsules, or extracts, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions with other medications.
